prerequisites: A Freshchat account. API tokens are available on the Free, Growth, Pro, and Enterprise plans.
Account administrator access in Freshchat, since only an account admin can generate or delete API tokens.
Your unique Freshchat account name (the account_name config field), which forms part of the API URL https://<account-name>.freshchat.com.
A start date (the start_date config field) marking the earliest point from which to sync historical data.

authMethods.name: API key (Bearer access token)
authMethods.summary: The single secret field api_key holds a Freshchat API token. Freshchat uses OAuth 2.0, where this token is the access token that identifies the requester and defines permissions. The connector sends it on every request in the HTTP Authorization header using the Bearer scheme: 'Authorization: Bearer <access-token>'. The token grants access to all user and conversation data in the account, so store it securely.

setupSteps.title: Generate the Freshchat API token
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Freshchat as an account administrator. For a standalone Freshchat account, go to Admin > CONFIGURE > API Tokens and click Generate Token. For a built-in chat account (Freshsales Suite), go to Settings > Admin Settings > Website Tracking and APIs > API Settings and find the token in the API DETAILS FOR CHAT section. Freshchat allows only one token at a time; to rotate it, delete the existing token first, then generate a new one. Copy the token for the api_key field.

setupSteps.title: Find your account name
setupSteps.body: Determine the unique account name for your Freshchat instance. For standalone accounts this is the subdomain in your API URL https://<account-name>.freshchat.com. Enter it in the account_name field.

setupSteps.title: Set the sync start date
setupSteps.body: Provide a start_date that marks the earliest point from which the connector should pull historical Freshchat data.

setupSteps.title: Provide credentials and configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter the generated API token in the api_key field, the account name in account_name, and the start date in start_date. The connector authenticates each request with Authorization: Bearer <api_key> against your account's Freshchat API.

sources.title: Generate API tokens in Freshchat - Freshworks Support
